description: Source-grounded trustworthiness cases: does a claim actually follow from its source excerpt? Binary label 'supported' vs 'not_supported'. Categories: numeric/factual = the server's data domain; semantic = meaning-only cases that need the LLM backend.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: Official figures put the unemployment rate at 4.2 percent in May.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: Official figures put the unemployment rate at 4.2 percent in May.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: Bitcoin hit 70000 dollars on Tuesday before pulling back.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: Bitcoin hit 70000 dollars on Tuesday before pulling back.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: The company employs 1500 people in total across its offices.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: The company employs 1500 people in total across its offices.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: GDP grew 3 percent last year according to the bureau.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: GDP grew 3 percent last year according to the bureau.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: On 2026-05-01 EUR/USD was 1.08 according to the ECB reference rate.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: On 2026-05-01 EUR/USD was 1.08 according to the ECB reference rate.

cases.label: supported
cases.claim: Paris is the capital of France.
cases.source: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.claim: The treaty was signed in Geneva.
cases.source: The article reviews recent smartphone camera improvements.

cases.label: supported
cases.claim: Photosynthesis converts sunlight into chemical energy.
cases.source: Through photosynthesis green plants convert sunlight into chemical energy stored as sugar.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.claim: The mission landed on Mars in 2021.
cases.source: The space agency discussed its future exploration plans at the conference.

cases.label: supported
cases.claim: Mount Everest is the tallest mountain on Earth.
cases.source: Mount Everest is Earth's tallest mountain measured above sea level.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: The study found the vaccine is not effective against the new variant.

cases.label: not_supported
cases.source: Recent data shows inflation is no longer rising and has begun to fall.

cases.label: supported
cases.source: The chief executive stepped down from her role on Friday.
